referral.title: Referral System
referral.rule1: User must register and complete a weekly strike.
referral.rule2: Wallet balance must reach at least 10 GLD.
referral.rule3: Profile must have username, real name, and phone number added.
referral.rewardsDesc: Referees get 0.5 GLD welcome bonus. Referrers get 5% bonus on active referrals.
referral.setupDesc: Please set a unique username in your Profile to activate your Referral Link and start earning.

settings.title: Settings

pepe.title: PEPE CAVE
pepe.gateDesc: Match 6 pairs of ancient symbols to unlock the PEPE Cave entrance.
pepe.revealSuccess: Success! You found {{amount}} PEPE coins in this corner of the cave!
pepe.alreadyExplored: You have already explored a cell in this round! Wait for the next cave opening.
pepe.alreadyClaimed: This specific corner has already been cleared by another explorer!
pepe.rule1: New cave formations appear every 4 hours GMT (0, 4, 8, 12, 16, 20:00).
pepe.rule2: Each cave contains exactly 10,000 PEPE spread across 100 cells.
pepe.rule3: Users can claim only ONE cell per round. Be quick!
pepe.rule4: You must solve the security puzzle to enter the cave each time.

checklist.step1Desc: Status checked from Profile > Account section
checklist.step3Desc: Check your educational progress in Academy

academy.requirementDesc: You must answer 75% of the questions correctly; this is a requirement for the Mainnet Checklist.

options: Peer to Peer (Direct exchange between users)

options: By watching the trade in person

options: As soon as the buyer says they paid
After you receive and verify the payment in your bank/app

34.text: What should you do if a buyer asks to trade outside the app?
options: Report them and stay within the Athena platform for safety

35.text: Is there a rating system for P2P traders?
options: Yes, to show trust and successful history

It mines Bitcoin on your phone

The release of the independent, live Athena blockchain

options: They are migrated/converted based on eligibility

11.title: P2P Trading Mastery

The one with the lowest balance

options: No, the platform ensures crypto is held until payment is confirmed

55.text: What should you include in the payment description?
options: Only what the seller specifies, usually a reference code

options: No, just an hour a day
Yes, high availability ensures network stability
A penalty for nodes that act maliciously or go offline

options: Yes, allowing many users to share one node's rewards

options: A group of users combining tokens to increase rewards
The user with the least tokens

Yes, smart contracts handle distribution based on share
Only if you win a contest

An algorithm that provides instant liquidity for swaps

Yes, you keep control of your keys
